name: GOLFTEC Washington Township
address: 415 Egg Harbor Rd Suite 10, Sewell, NJ 08080
about: GOLFTEC Washington Township is a high-tech golf training studio focused on personalized instruction and practice using advanced technology. The center utilizes OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven feedback for swing improvement and club fitting. Services include private golf lessons, club fitting sessions, and practice memberships with access to training bays. GOLFTEC's approach is centered on certified PGA coaches who create personalized game plans, suitable for both beginners and experienced players looking to refine their skills.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced motion capture and launch monitor technology
Personalized lesson plans and game plans created by certified PGA coaches
Access to training bays for independent practice with video feedback
Professional club fitting services using launch monitors and shaft optimization

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides clubs for use during lessons and fittings. For club fitting services, you will be matched with custom-fit clubs from top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food or drink services, and the venue does not appear to have a full bar or kitchen. It is recommended to confirm with the center directly if outside food or drink is permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for an 18-hole simulation. The duration may vary depending on the simulator software and the number of players, but a typical round can take between 1.5 to 2.5 hours.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and coaching, making it a suitable environment for young golfers to learn and improve their skills with age-appropriate instruction.
